title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (21), UNDER "al. NUEVA VIZCAYA," SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED.

chunks.text:
H. No. 6139 / 53 OG No. 17, 5580 (September 15, 1957

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1811, June 22, 1957 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (21), UNDER "al. NUEVA VIZCAYA," SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWELVE HUNDRED.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (21), under "

al. Nueva Vizcaya,

" section two of Republic Act Numbered Twelve hundred, is amended to read as follows:

"(21)

Construction and improvement of;

(

a

)

La Torre Elementary School Home Economics Building, Bayombong .............................. P10,000.00

(

b

)

Malasin Elementary School Home Economics Building, Dupax ........................................ 10,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1957.
